prompt: Use the halftone map to modulate dot size across the poster, giving a vintage print look.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 (the poster) by applying a halftone dot pattern across its entire surface. Use image 2 as a reference to modulate the size and density of the dots, ensuring that the dot distribution on image 1 corresponds to the intensity variations present in image 2. The final result should convey a vintage, screen-printed aesthetic.
